overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket walking through a dense, foggy coniferous forest. The character follows a winding dirt path and approaches an abandoned wooden well structure with a mysterious red glow emanating from its interior, creating an ominous atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest path through foggy pine woods with rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path surrounded by dense fog and tall evergreen trees

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees forming dense forest canopy
rocky hillside with scattered boulders and dry vegetation
decaying fallen tree trunks lying among the underbrush
narrow winding dirt trail covered with pine needles and debris
dense low vegetation and shrubs lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path through a dense, foggy forest. Tall pine trees line both sides with rocky outcrops visible on the left, while fallen logs and underbrush fill the spaces between the trunks. The atmosphere is thick with fog, limiting visibility and creating a claustrophobic, ominous mood.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest clearing with abandoned wooden well structure

events.description: wooden well structure emerges from the fog in the center of the clearing ahead
camera tilts upward to reveal the tall tree canopy and gray sky visible through the branches

agents.ego_description: approaching the wooden well structure while navigating the final stretch of forest path

entered.detail: old wooden gazebo-like structure with a roof covering a stone well base
stone foundation supporting the wooden well structure

segments.scene_description: As the character continues forward, a wooden well structure becomes visible through the fog in a small clearing. The camera tilts upward to show the towering pine canopy against the gray sky before returning to focus on the approaching well. The rocky terrain gives way to a more open area surrounding the stone and wood structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden well with stone foundation and mysterious red interior lighting

events.description: character stops at the well and peers down into the dark opening
red glow becomes visible emanating from deep inside the well interior

agents.ego_description: circling the well structure and examining the ominous red glow emanating from within

entered.detail: weathered wooden roof structure with moss covering the shingles
simple wooden fence surrounding the well perimeter
eerie red light glowing from the depths of the well shaft

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at the abandoned well and walks around its perimeter. The structure features a wooden roof supported by posts over a stone base. As the character peers inside, a mysterious red glow becomes visible from deep within the well shaft, contrasting sharply with the gray fog and brown wood of the surrounding forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, foggy forest that gradually opens into a clearing centered around a mysterious structure. It begins with the character navigating a narrow dirt path flanked by tall pine trees, rocky outcrops, and dense underbrush under a thick blanket of fog. As the character pushes forward, the terrain opens into a small clearing where a wooden well becomes visible, prompting the camera to tilt upward toward the towering canopy and gray sky before refocusing on the structure. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the abandoned well and circles its stone base and wooden roof. Finally, the camera peers into the shaft, revealing a mysterious red glow that contrasts sharply with the muted grays and browns of the surrounding woods.
